_comment: Typst font endpoint example — layers Noto Serif/Sans CJK SC + Mono CJK on top of the local fonts when settings.compiler.typstFontEndpoint points here. Binaries come from jsdelivr (notofonts/noto-cjk@main) with long-lived Cache-Control so repeated inits hit Electron's disk cache. The font list mirrors what `pnpm download:typst-wasm:cjk` bundles locally — keep the two in sync.
